message: 🌱 Add kubestellar: bump peter-evans/repository-dispatch from 3.0.0 to 4.0.1 mission (#456)

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubestellar-3677-bump-peter-evans-repository-dispatch-from-3-0-0-to-4-0-1",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubestellar: bump peter-evans/repository-dispatch from 3.0.0 to 4.0.1",
+    "description": "bump peter-evans/repository-dispatch from 3.0.0 to 4.0.1. This issue affects 1+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kubestellar feature symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kubestellar deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=kubestellar\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubestellar -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: bump peter-evans/repository-dispatch from 3.0.0 to 4.0.1"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current resource configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubestellar resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get resource -A\nkubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>\n```\nBump peter-evans/repository-dispatch from 3.0.0 to 4.0.1 in the GitHub Actions reverse map (`.gha-reversemap.yml`) and the workflows that use it."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for bump peter-evans/repository-dispatch from 3.0.0 to 4.0.1",
+        "description": "## Summary\n\nUpdates `peter-evans/repository-dispatch` GitHub Action from v3.0.0 to v4.0.1 (SHA `28959ce8df70de7be546dd1250a005dd32156697`).\n\n**Changes:**\n- Updated `.gha-reversemap.yml` with v4.0.1 SHA and tag references\n- Updated `.github/workflows/goreleaser.yml` to use new SHA with version comment\n\n## Related issue(s)\n\nIssue #3677\n\n<details>\n\n<summary>Original prompt</summary>\n\n> \n> ----\n> \n> *This section details on the original issue you should resolve*\n> \n> <issue_title>bump peter-evans/re\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade kubestellar to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade kubestellar:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade kubestellar jetstack/kubestellar --namespace cert-manager\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager\nhelm list -n cert-manager\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm bump peter-evans/repository-dispatch from 3.0.0 to is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubestellar -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: ## Summary\n\nUpdates `peter-evans/repository-dispatch` GitHub Action from v3.0.0 to v4.0.1 (SHA `28959ce8df70de7be546dd1250a005dd32156697`).\n\n**Changes:**\n- Updated `.gha-reversemap.yml` with v4.0.1 SHA and tag references\n- Updated `.github/workflows/goreleaser.yml` to use new SHA with version comment\n\n## Related issue(s)\n\nIssue #3677\n\n<details>\n\n<summary>Original prompt</summary>\n\n> \n> ----\n> \n> *. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",

+    }
+  },
